LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER M B N A AMERICA BANK, N.A'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED.
